user_query: I want to learn more about Jet Set Radio and Jet Set Radio Future, including fun facts about the artists and a list of all the levels with their details.

TaskList.description: Gather fun facts about the artists who contributed to Jet Set Radio and Jet Set Radio Future.
Compile a list of all the levels in Jet Set Radio and Jet Set Radio Future along with their respective details.
Combine the information gathered about the artists and the level details into a comprehensive report.
